positive: A vibrant, stylized geometric pattern of mythical creatures and celestial elements, featuring silhouettes of soaring phoenixes, griffin wings, and constellations forming an ornate, repeating mandala design. The composition is symmetrical and centered, rendered in a vibrant color palette of deep sapphire blues, burnt orange, and gold metallic accents. High contrast is key, emphasizing clean outlines and flat color fields suitable for screen printing. Style: Art Deco meets mystical tribal tattoo art, clean vector aesthetic, perfect for repeating tile pattern, isolated on a clean white background, maximalist symmetry.
negative: low detail, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, noise, blur, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, sketch, photorealism, gradient fade, illegible text
